Required Documents: Policy number, incident report, bills/invoices, and supporting evidence. Pre-existing Conditions: Covered after waiting period as defined by policy schedule. Exclusions: Cosmetic procedures are excluded unless medically necessary and approved. Fraud: Staged events, fabricated losses, and manipulated evidence are grounds for rejection and legal action.
ground_truth: Mental health treatment coverage depends on policy terms and regulatory requirements.
